nuggets.headline: Jamee Cornelia's 'Rap Cinema' samples The Wiz and Midsommar scores for lyrical magic.
nuggets.text: Beyond conventional beats, Jamee Cornelia takes on unique challenges with her 'Rap Cinema' series. She samples movie soundtracks, transforming scores from cult classics like Ari Aster’s horror film Midsommar and the beloved musical The Wiz into unexpected backdrops for her lyrical magic, sometimes even taking suggestions from her social media followers. This showcases her unique blend of cinematic vision and sharp lyrical improvisation.

source.title: Meet Me @ The Altar, Jamee Cornelia and vintage Producers
source.quoteSnippet: I consider The Wiz one of my favorite musicals. So for 'Wizard,' I sampled 'He’s the Wizard' from The Wiz (1978 movie version starring Diana Ross).

nuggets.imageCaption: Jamee Cornelia (center) with vibrant hair, reflecting her artistic flair.

nuggets.headline: Jamee Cornelia believes there's 'no best way' to release music, embracing web3's experimental future.
nuggets.text: For Jamee Cornelia, the journey of releasing music is a canvas for constant innovation, not a fixed formula. She states there's “no best way” to roll out a song or album, only different directions, which drives her deep experimentation with web3 tools for distribution and collaboration. This philosophy shapes how every project, including 'HARVEST,' explores new ways to foster communal economy and interactive experiences for listeners.

source.title: Ten Questions with Artist Jamee Cornelia - Dequency - Medium
source.quoteSnippet: There is no 'best' way to roll out a song or album, only different directions. I’m heavily experimenting with web3 tools for distribution and collaboration.
source.locator: Q: What is the most exciting aspect of web3 that will shape the music industry?

nuggets.imageCaption: Jamee Cornelia leads artist relations in the web3 space.

nuggets.headline: For more genre-blending hip-hop like 'SLACK,' dive into the abstract world of H31R.
nuggets.text: If the way 'SLACK' blurs creative boundaries and delivers Jamee Cornelia's direct, yet artful, rhymes resonates with you, then you absolutely need to explore H31R. This experimental hip-hop duo shares Jamee's knack for sonically blending eras and ideas, crafting tracks that are deliberately simple in their production but never simplistic. H31R’s abstract beats and thoughtful lyricism will give you that same satisfying sense of organic connection over needless posturing.

source.title: Bandcamp Picks: Jamee Cornelia & Cecily Renns - MGRM
source.quoteSnippet: Sonically, she blurs eras and ideas alike. Her work focuses on a robust sense of humanity and organic connection over needless posturing.

nuggets.imageCaption: H31R delivers abstract hip-hop with thoughtful, genre-bending production.

artistSummary: Jamee Cornelia is a multi-disciplinary artist, rapper, and MC, known for her charisma and authenticity. She evolved from fronting punk bands to releasing solo hip-hop, directing music videos, and co-running her indie label L7 Records, all while fearlessly experimenting with web3 for distribution and collaboration.
